warm_up:
Activation & Mobilisation Drills:
1 round
Warm Up
10 Scap Push Ups
10 scap Pull ups
5 Hindu Push Ups
10m bear Crawls
10 x Inch Worms
10 Cossack Squats

metcon.name: Workout
metcon.description:
AMRAP x 10 mins
8 T2B or straight leg / hanging leg raise
6m Handstand Walk OR 2 Wall Walks
15 air squats

gymnastics:
EMOM x 4
12 Hollow Rocks
T2B Bar Progression
1-2 mins False Grip on bar - focus on Knuckles Up
EMOM x 3
10 x Beat Swing
EMOM x 3
Bigger Beat Swing - Push Down on Bar
- Put Ball between feet - Reach Long in the Arch - Dont bend the knees
EMOM x 3
Knees to Chest - Aggressive & Pop - pause when weightless
EMOM x 4
Beat Swing with Straight legs - to target
Aim for height without losing tension.
EMOM x 6
T2B Practice
EMOM X 3 20s handstand hold
EMOM X 3 180 deg. Conan Walk (on box) x 2
EMOM X 3 5-10 Shoulder taps (or wall walk)
EMOM X 5 Tripod Handstand Hold
EMOM X 5 Spotted Freestanding Handstand Hold
EMOM X 5 Spotted handstand walk with PVC

hypertrophy.reasoning: Today hammers shoulders, core, and quads via gymnastics and metcon; target opposing patterns to build balanced hypertrophy without compounding fatigue.

siri_text: Thursday's workout. Gymnastics: . Metcon: AMRAP 10 minutes: 8 T2B or straight leg / hanging leg raise, 6m Handstand Walk OR 2 Wall Walks, 15 air squats. For hypertrophy, focus on back (lats), chest, hamstrings.
